title: Topological edge modes in a driven photonic lattice
abstract: We study protected edge transport in a periodically driven photonic lattice and characterize the resulting band topology.

title: Magnetic ordering in a two-dimensional van der Waals material
abstract: Neutron scattering and transport measurements reveal a low-temperature magnetic phase transition in an exfoliated layered crystal.

title: Jet quenching in relativistic heavy-ion collisions
abstract: We compare parton energy loss models with measurements of high transverse momentum hadrons produced in nucleus-nucleus collisions.

title: Entanglement generation in superconducting qubits
abstract: A microwave pulse sequence prepares and verifies multipartite entangled states in a superconducting circuit architecture.

title: Turbulent mixing in stratified fluid flows
abstract: Direct numerical simulations quantify intermittency and scalar transport in a stably stratified turbulent shear flow.
